# Barron Pest Control

> Long Island's trusted pest control experts since 1989. Family-owned and operated by Michael Walker (2nd generation). Serving Suffolk County, Nassau County, the Hamptons, and NYC. NYSDEC Licensed Commercial Applicator #C1889403. Available 24/7/365.

## About

Barron Pest Control is a family-owned and operated pest control business based in Mastic, NY (105 Main Avenue, Mastic NY 11950). Founded in 1989, now in its second generation under Michael Walker. 39 years in business, 3 employees. Bobby Corrigan Rat Academy graduate (2017). NYSDEC Registered Pesticide Business #17056. Members of NPMA, NYPMA, NYSWMA, NWCOA. QualityPro Certified. Thumbtack Top Pro 2018.

## Services

- [Residential Pest Control](https://barronpestcontrol.com/services)
- [Commercial Pest Control](https://barronpestcontrol.com/commercial)
- [Rat Control](https://barronpestcontrol.com/services/rat-control)
- [Mouse Control](https://barronpestcontrol.com/services/mouse-control)
- [Termite Control](https://barronpestcontrol.com/services/termite-control)
- [Mosquito & Tick Control](https://barronpestcontrol.com/services/mosquito-control)
- [Wasp Control](https://barronpestcontrol.com/services/wasp-control)
- [Cockroach Control](https://barronpestcontrol.com/services/cockroach-control)
- [Bed Bug Control](https://barronpestcontrol.com/services/bed-bug-control)
- [Flea Control](https://barronpestcontrol.com/services/flea-control)

- [Suffolk County](https://barronpestcontrol.com/areas/suffolk-county)

## Key Facts

- Family-owned since 1989 (39 years)
- 2nd generation owner: Michael Walker
- NY State License: #C1889403 (Commercial Applicator, valid through Feb 2028)
- NYSDEC Registered Pesticide Business: #17056
- Available 24/7, 365 days a year
- Eco-friendly Integrated Pest Management (IPM) approach
- Discounts for police, fire, EMS, and seniors
- All work includes service warranties
- Background checked employees
- Accepts: Apple Pay, Cash, Check, Credit Card, Google Pay, PayPal, Samsung Pay, Square, Stripe, Venmo, Zelle
